description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, angular fuselage with a matte gray finish, designed for both aerodynamic efficiency and a modern appearance. The main rotor consists of four long, black blades with orange tips, while the tail rotor is mounted vertically at the end of a slender tail boom and also features orange-tipped blades. The cockpit is equipped with large, faceted blue-tinted windows that wrap around the front and sides, providing excellent visibility for the crew. The landing gear consists of two robust, black skids attached to the underside of the fuselage, offering stability during ground operations. Subtle panel lines and structural details are visible along the body, suggesting reinforced composite or metal construction. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A modern gray helicopter with four black-orange main rotor blades, blue-tinted cockpit windows, and sturdy black landing skids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, faceted cockpit windows, the full span of the main rotor blades, and the landing skids beneath the nose.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, the main and tail rotors, and the full length of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, vertical tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cockpit windows, main rotor, and tail rotor from the other side.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite or metal, colored black with orange tips, each blade approximately 5-6 meters in length.
attribute_tail_rotor: A vertical tail rotor with four short black blades, each with orange tips, mounted at the end of the tail boom.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, black landing skids made of metal or composite, with simple crossbar supports and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three large, faceted cockpit windows wrapping around the front and sides, blue-tinted with black framing, providing wide visibility.
